sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt64, name String, description String, created_at DateTime, value Float32);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 'Example One', 'This is a sample description AAAAA', now(), 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (2, 'Example Two', 'This is a sample description bBBBB', now(), 20.75);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (3, 'Example Three', 'Another description cCCCCC', now(), 30.0);

SELECT countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(name, 'E') AS e_count, multiIf(e_count > 0, 'Contains E', 'No E') AS e_presence FROM (SELECT countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(name, 'e') AS e_count FROM test_data);
SELECT id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(description, 'sample', 1) AS sample_count FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING sample_count > 0;

SELECT t.id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(t.name, 'example', 1) as case_insensitive_count FROM test_data t JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE multiIf(value > 20, 1, 0) = 1) AS filtered ON t.id = filtered.id;
SELECT id, name, countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(CAST(NULL AS String), 'x') AS null_string_count FROM test_data GROUP BY id, name;

SELECT DISTINCT id, multiIf(NO_MATCH_COUNT = 0, 'No Matches', 'Matches Found') AS match_status FROM (SELECT id, countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(description, 'absent') AS NO_MATCH_COUNT FROM test_data GROUP BY id);
SELECT created_at, countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(value, '10') AS beyond_boundary FROM (SELECT CAST(value AS String) FROM test_data) WHERE beyond_boundary > 0;
SELECT id, name, multiIf(countSubstringsCaseInsensitive(name, 'Three') > 0, 1, 0) AS found FROM test_data WHERE found = 1;
